data.title: ZenaTech acquires Tucson's Putt Land Surveying Inc., boosts Drone as a Service growth in Phoenix and Arizona.
data.description: ZenaTech has recently acquired Tucson's Putt Land Surveying Inc., marking a significant development in their expansion plans. With this acquisition, ZenaTech aims to bolster its presence in the region and accelerate the growth of its Drone as a Service (DaaS) offerings, especially in the Phoenix area. This move aligns with their strategy to capitalize on the increasing demand for drone services, leveraging advanced technology and expertise to cater to the market. The acquisition further consolidates ZenaTech's position in the industry and opens up new opportunities for the company.

data.title: DoW selects InterDigital to lead project on mid-band spectrum sharing, involving industry-academia team.
data.description: InterDigital has been granted project leadership of a collaboration between industry and academia to explore efficient dynamic spectrum sharing in the mid-band range. This project will involve coordinating efforts between government and industry partners to develop innovative solutions. The collaboration aims to optimize spectrum usage in the mid-band frequency range, with a focus on improving efficiency and enabling a more extensive range of applications. This initiative underscores the importance of fostering cooperation between different stakeholders to address the growing demand for wireless connectivity. The project led by InterDigital will leverage expertise from various sectors to drive innovation in spectrum sharing.

data.title: Filevine debuts Legal Operating Intelligence System (LOIS) at LEX Summit 2025, offering advanced AI tech for legal intelligence.
data.description: A recently unveiled technology called Legal Operating Intelligence System (LOIS) is set to revolutionize legal intelligence at the annual customer conference LEX Summit 2025 in Salt Lake City. Developed by Filevine, LOIS integrates advanced AI technology to enhance the legal sector's efficiency and connectivity. This innovation represents a significant step forward for the industry and showcases the ongoing evolution in legal technology. The introduction of LOIS at this event signifies a major milestone in advancing the future of legal intelligence and signifies the commitment to leveraging technology for improved performance.

data.title: illycaffè reveals finalists for Ernesto Illy International Coffee Award 2025, with 27 producers from 9 countries vying for title of Sustainable Coffee of the Year.
data.description: In Trieste, Italy, 27 coffee producers hailing from 9 different countries are vying for the prestigious title of Sustainable Coffee of the Year. This competition marks the 10th anniversary of the Ernesto Illy International Coffee Award, dedicated to the memory of Ernesto Illy, the founder's son.

data.title: 7shifts report shows 67% of restaurants spend over 100 hours per year on payroll. New benchmark aims to improve efficiency.
data.description: A recent report uncovered that a significant 67% of restaurants invest over 100 hours annually on payroll management. The report, released by 7shifts, a popular scheduling and payroll tool for restaurant owners, presents The Restaurant Payroll Benchmark as a solution to this issue. The benchmark aims to provide a structured framework for enhancing efficiency and ultimately driving growth within the industry. The findings shed light on the extensive time spent on payroll tasks within restaurants, indicating a pressing need for streamlined processes to alleviate this burden.

data.title: MergerWare and Mercer partner to enhance M&A deals, combining expertise with digital platform for integration success.
data.description: Mercer, a division of Marsh McLennan (NYSE: MMC) known for its global M&A advisory services, has joined forces with MergerWare, a digital execution platform. This collaboration aims to enhance integration processes by utilizing Mercer's expertise alongside MergerWare's technology. The partnership, announced on Oct. 9, 2025 in New York, is set to provide more efficient and effective integration solutions, ultimately leading to increased success rates in mergers and acquisitions.

data.title: Bridgewater Commons celebrates Diwali with 2-day event on Oct 18 - 19, featuring South Asian culture, music, dance, crafts.
data.description: The Festival of South Asian culture, featuring a mix of traditional and modern music and dance performances, crafts, and giveaways, is set to take place in Bridgewater Township, NJ on October 9-10, 2025. This expansion to two days comes as a response to increasing customer interest. The event aims to highlight the vibrancy and richness of South Asian culture and is expected to draw a large crowd.

data.title: Arizona households see significant increase in income, tens of thousands of new jobs created, and accelerated statewide growth, according to new report.
data.description: Today, the Center for the Future of Arizona (CFA) released a new analysis indicating significant economic progress in the state. The report highlights that households are benefiting from an increase of thousands of dollars each month on average. Moreover, tens of thousands of new jobs have been generated, contributing to a state-wide growth acceleration. This data underscores a positive trend in Arizona's economy, showcasing the success of prioritizing economic development initiatives.
